data.title: What's Going On With Nvidia Stock On Friday?
data.description: Production delays for Nvidia's Blackwell chips until 2025 have prompted Amazon Web Services & Dell to wait for bulk volumes, impacting their plans.

Why United Airlines (UAL) Stock Hit A New 52-Week
data.description: United Airlines shares hit a new 52-week high of $74.56 this week. The company's third-quarter earnings report were released Tuesday after the market closed.

data.title: What's Going On With Bank Of America (BAC) Shares
data.description: Bank of America shares are trading flat week, though near 52-week highs. The company reported a strong Q3 fiscal 2024 net income of $6.9 billion.
